## pluginExternalBundle() function

Create a rsbuild plugin for loading external bundles.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function pluginExternalBundle(options: PluginExternalBundleOptions): RsbuildPlugin;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  options | [PluginExternalBundleOptions](./external-bundle-rsbuild-plugin.pluginexternalbundleoptions.md) | Plugin options. |

**Returns:**

`RsbuildPlugin`

## Example

```ts
import { pluginExternalBundle } from '@lynx-js/external-bundle-rsbuild-plugin'
import { pluginReactLynx } from '@lynx-js/react-rsbuild-plugin'

export default {
  plugins: [
    pluginReactLynx(),
    pluginExternalBundle({
      externalsPresets: {
        reactlynx: true,
      },
      externals: {
        './App.js': 'comp-lib.lynx.bundle',
      },
      globalObject: 'globalThis',
    }),
  ],
}
```
